sections.description:
A beautiful, fully-featured audio player for WordPress. Supports live radio streams, HLS, and a built-in file player with playlist, progress bar, and resume-from-last-position.

Two player modes: Live Stream (HLS, Shoutcast, Icecast, MP3/AAC/OGG with live now-playing metadata) and File Player (Media Library playlists with seek, 15-second skip, auto-advance, and resume). Six skins, custom gradients, dark mode, glassmorphism, multi-station support, and a fully interactive live admin preview.
sections.changelog:
3.9.26

  • Self-hosted updates now delivered via Plugin Update Checker 5.7 with the manifest served from GitHub.
